---
title: "Research"
---

## Overview

I am interested in questions at the interface of random matrix theory, high-dimensional probability, spin glass models, and their applications to machine learning theory.

I also want to learn more about integrable probability and KPZ universality.

## Undergraduate Research

During the [SMALL REU](https://hub.williams.edu/math/small/) as an undergraduate, I worked on problems in commutative algebra concerning completions of local domains, quasi-excellence, and formal fibers.

### Completions of Quasi-excellent Domains (2025)

With David Baron, S. Loepp, AnaMaria Perez, and M. Teplitskiy. *Beiträge zur Algebra und Geometrie / Contributions to Algebra and Geometry*.

**Summary:** We characterize which complete local Noetherian rings of characteristic zero arise as completions of quasi-excellent local domains. We also construct examples controlling saturated chains of primes, including noncatenary quasi-excellent local domains.

**Links:**  [PDF](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2310.00479) | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.00479)

<details>
<summary>BibTeX</summary>

```bibtex
@article{baron2023completions,
  title         = {Completions of Quasi-excellent Domains},
  author        = {Baron, David and Eltigani, Ammar and Loepp, S. and Perez, AnaMaria and Teplitskiy, M.},
  journal       = {Beitr{\"a}ge zur Algebra und Geometrie / Contributions to Algebra and Geometry},
  year          = {2023},
  eprint        = {2310.00479},
  archivePrefix = {arXiv},
  primaryClass  = {math.AC}
}
```

</details>

### Controlling Formal Fibers of Countably Many Principal Prime Ideals (2026)

With David Baron, S. Loepp, AnaMaria Perez, and M. Teplitskiy. *Journal of Algebra and Its Applications*.

**Summary:** We give conditions under which prescribed countable families of prime ideals occur as maximal elements in formal fibers over principal prime ideals. We also establish versions where the realizing domain is countable and/or excellent.

**Links:**  [PDF](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2311.15797) | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2311.15797)

<details>
<summary>BibTeX</summary>

```bibtex
@article{baron2023controlling,
  title         = {Controlling Formal Fibers of Countably Many Principal Prime Ideals},
  author        = {Baron, David and Eltigani, Ammar and Loepp, S. and Perez, AnaMaria and Teplitskiy, M.},
  journal       = {Journal of Algebra and Its Applications},
  volume        = {25},
  number        = {09},
  pages         = {2650083},
  year          = {2026},
  eprint        = {2311.15797},
  archivePrefix = {arXiv},
  primaryClass  = {math.AC}
}
```

</details>
